creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #6)

SRCCONF use instead of SRC_ENV_CONF use did not make the
difference for kernel-toolchain: It still fails . . .

Script started on Sun Jan 22 12:24:10 2017
Command: env __MAKE_CONF=/root/src.configs/make.conf SRC_ENV_CONF=/dev/null SRCCONF=/root/src.configs/src.conf.powerpc64-clang_altbinutils-bootstrap.powerpc64-host WITH_META_MODE=yes MAKEOBJDIRPREFIX=/usr/obj/powerpc64vtsc_clang_altbinutils_kernel/powerpc.powerpc64 make -j 4 kernel-toolchain

got the same failure result details in the meta file:

# Meta data file /usr/obj/powerpc64vtsc_clang_altbinutils_kernel/powerpc.powerpc64/usr/src/tmp/usr/src/lib/clang/libllvmminimal/_usr_obj_powerpc64vtsc_clang_altbinutils_kernel_powerpc.powerpc64_usr_src_tmp_usr_src_lib_clang_libllvmminimal_Support_APInt.o.meta
CMD clang++  -O2 -pipe -B/usr/local/powerpc64-freebsd/bin/ -B/usr/local/powerpc64-freebsd/bin/  -std=c++11 -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti  -stdlib=libc++ -Wno-c++11-extensions  -c /usr/src/contrib/llvm/lib/Support/APInt.cpp -o Support/APInt.o
CWD /usr/obj/powerpc64vtsc_clang_altbinutils_kernel/powerpc.powerpc64/usr/src/tmp/usr/src/lib/clang/libllvmminimal
TARGET Support/APInt.o
-- command output --
/usr/src/contrib/llvm/lib/Support/APInt.cpp:15:10: fatal error: 'llvm/ADT/APInt.h' file not found
#include "llvm/ADT/APInt.h"
         ^
1 error generated.
*** Error code 1
